name: Guide to Cyber Threat Information Sharing
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-150 (2016) provides guidance on cyber threat information sharing programs — coordinating with ISACs, ISAOs, government partners, and peer organizations. Foundational for threat intelligence programs.
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud providers participate in threat-sharing communities and provide threat-intelligence feeds.
relationToAISecurity: AI-augmented threat intelligence systems use the 800-150 sharing model.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source PDF acquisition + extraction is TODO.
